title: 2026 Grammy Predictions: Who Will Win Every Rap Award?
text: Complex Magazine's Grammy predictions feature Clipse as the expected winner for Best Rap Album for their album Let God Sort Em Out. The prediction considers several factors supporting this outcome: Cultural Impact - The project marks the duo's first album in 16 years, generating significant attention from the hip-hop community. Active Campaign - The aggressive campaigning by Pusha and Malice has bolstered their chances. Timing Advantage - Since Kendrick Lamar's GNX dropped in 2024, it may face recency disadvantages compared to more recent releases. Competition - Other strong contenders include Kendrick Lamar (GNX), Tyler, the Creator (Chromakopia), JID (God Does Like Ugly), and GloRilla (Glorious). The article notes that every entry has a strong case for its merits, making this one of the most competitive rap categories.
